nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode
widgets_values:
A fashion photography work full of surreal romanticism, using a low-angle upward shooting composition, with a clear light blue sky as the background, and the visual focus concentrated on the fantasy blue vegetation and the model walking through it.

The vegetation in the picture is processed into varying shades of blue, from light ice blue to deep cobalt blue. The textures of the leaves and branches are delicate and realistic. The warm brown tree trunks form a sharp contrast with the cool blue leaves, resembling a dreamy forest from another world. An African-American model wearing a yellow and white vertical striped long dress walks slowly on the sand. The warm tones of the dress echo with the surrounding cool blue vegetation. The noon sun casts clear shadows on the sand, enhancing the sense of space and reality in the picture.

The entire scene, with its clean and transparent colors and fantasy settings, not only exudes the vastness of the natural wilderness but also presents a quiet and poetic high-fashion sense due to the surreal vegetation.

properties.pe_extracted_data: {"positive_prompt":"{ \"scene\": \"A high-resolution, photorealistic close-up shot of a 20-year-old man in cosplay, standing confidently while holding a black handheld microphone in her right hand. She is wearing a vibrant, multi-colored costume with distinct fabric textures and wearing a long, voluminous wig in bright, saturated hues. The background is a softly blurred stage environment with bokeh lights, emphasizing the sharp focus on the subject. The lighting is professional stage lighting with high contrast, highlighting the contours of her face and the sheen of the wig fibers.\", \"subjects\": [ { \"description\": \"A 20-year-old man with a youthful face, sharp features, and an engaging expression.\", \"position\": \"Center frame, facing slightly to the left.\", \"action\": \"Holding a black wired microphone in her right hand, positioned near her mouth as if singing or speaking, with her left hand slightly raised near her chest.\" }, { \"description\": \"A colorful cosplay outfit consisting of layered fabrics in electric blue, magenta, and lime green, with visible stitching and material texture.\", \"position\": \"Worn by the man, covering her torso and arms.\", \"action\": \"Static, draping naturally over the body.\" }, { \"description\": \"A long, flowing wig with dyed sections in bright red, yellow, and blue streaks.\", \"position\": \"Surrounding the man's head and shoulders.\", \"action\": \"Hanging loosely, catching the light to show individual fiber strands.\" } ], \"style\": \"Photorealistic cosplay photography, 8k resolution, hyper-detailed, shot on 35mm film emulated, raw photo quality.\", \"color_palette\": \"Electric blue, magenta, lime green, vibrant red, golden yellow, deep black, and warm white stage highlights.\", \"lighting\": \"Hard stage spotlights from above and the front-right creating dramatic shadows and specular highlights on the skin and wig; cool ambient fill light from the front-left.\", \"mood\": \"Energetic, professional, vibrant, and focused.\", \"background\": \"A blurred concert stage or convention hall with out-of-focus colored LED panels and distant audience silhouettes.\", \"composition\": \"Medium close-up shot, subject centered vertically, shallow depth of field isolating the subject from the background.\", \"camera\": \"50mm lens, f/1.8 aperture, ISO 800, manual focus on the subject's eyes.\" }","negative_prompt":"","model_a":"z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors","model_b":"z_image_bf16.safetensors","model_a_found":true,"model_b_found":true,"loras_a":[],"loras_b":[],"vae":{"name":"ae.safetensors","source":"embedded"},"vae_found":true,"clip":{"names":["qwen_3_4b.safetensors"],"type":"","source":"embedded"},"sampler":{"steps_a":9,"steps_b":null,"cfg":1,"denoise":1,"seed_a":0,"seed_b":null,"sampler_name":"euler","scheduler":"simple"},"resolution":{"width":768,"height":1280,"batch_size":1,"length":null},"is_video":false,"model_family":"zimage","model_family_label":"Z-Image","lora_availability":{}}

widgets_values: Generate this image but in the style of the Pixar.

{
  "scene": "A vibrant, animated scene rendered in the characteristic Pixar style, featuring a young female singer performing on a brightly lit stage. Her appearance is exaggerated with large, expressive eyes and a perfectly sculpted face, embodying the studio's signature character design. She holds a microphone, captured mid-performance with a joyful and confident expression.",
  "subjects": [
    {
      "description": "A stylized young woman with a hyper-detailed, glossy skin texture and large, sparkling eyes.",
      "position": "Center of the frame, angled slightly towards the viewer.",
      "action": "Holding a black microphone with both hands, singing with a slight, charming smile."
    }
  ],
  "style": "Pixar-style 3D animation, featuring exaggerated proportions (large head and eyes), subsurface scattering for realistic skin, high-contrast lighting, and a focus on emotional expressiveness.",
  "color_palette": [
    "Hot Pink",
    "Electric Blue",
    "Neon Green",
    "Metallic Gold",
    "Bright Yellow",
    "Deep Black"
  ],
  "lighting": "High-key stage lighting with a powerful key light illuminating the subject from the front-left, creating soft shadows and a polished, cinematic sheen on the metallic materials of her outfit.",
  "mood": "Energetic, celebratory, and whimsical, capturing the joy of a pop concert.",
  "background": "A dark, blurred stage environment with soft bokeh lights and a large, bright rectangular studio light visible in the upper-left corner.",
  "composition": "Medium close-up shot focusing on the upper body and face of the subject, utilizing a shallow depth of field to isolate her from the background.",
  "camera": "Eye-level perspective with a slightly telephoto lens to compress the background and emphasize the subject's features."
}
